entries.name: test_fetch_consent_returns_first_match
entries.description: Test that it returns the first matching consent.

entries.name: test_fetch_consent_returns_none_when_not_exists
entries.description: Test that None is returned when consent doesn't exist.

entries.name: test_fetch_consent_with_user_objects
entries.description: Test fetching consent with User objects.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_empty_when_no_consent
entries.description: Test that an empty set is returned when no consents exist.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_ignores_cancelled
entries.description: Test that cancelled consents are ignored.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_ignores_not_accepted
entries.description: Test that non-accepted consents are ignored.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_ignores_revoked
entries.description: Test that revoked consents are ignored.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_mixed_consents
entries.description: Test with a mix of active and inactive consents.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_multiple_consents
entries.description: Test fetching profiles with multiple consents.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_returns_profile_objects
entries.description: Test that the set contains Profile objects.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_returns_set
entries.description: Test that the function returns a set.

entries.name: test_fetch_profiles_single_consent
entries.description: Test fetching profiles with a single consent.

entries.name: test_invalid_uuid_none
entries.description: Test that None returns False.

entries.name: test_invalid_uuid_number
entries.description: Test that a number returns False.

entries.name: test_invalid_uuid_string
entries.description: Test that an invalid UUID string returns False.

entries.name: test_uuid_with_dashes
entries.description: Test UUID with standard format.

entries.name: test_uuid_without_dashes
entries.description: Test UUID without dashes.

entries.name: test_valid_uuid_object
entries.description: Test that a valid UUID object returns True.

entries.name: test_valid_uuid_string
entries.description: Test that a valid UUID string returns True.

entries.name: test_cancel_removes_from_group
entries.description: Test cancel removes profile from group.

entries.name: test_cancel_sets_cancelled
entries.description: Test cancel sets cancelled flag and timestamp.

entries.name: test_uncancel_adds_back_to_group
entries.description: Test uncancel adds profile back to group.

entries.name: test_uncancel_clears_cancelled
entries.description: Test uncancel clears cancelled flag and timestamp.

entries.name: test_grant_consent_calls_add_to_primary_group
entries.description: Test grant_consent adds profile to primary group when no specific group.

entries.name: test_grant_consent_calls_add_to_specific_group
entries.description: Test grant_consent adds profile to specific group when UUID provided.

entries.name: test_grant_consent_does_not_grant_if_already_accepted
entries.description: Test grant_consent does nothing if already accepted.

entries.name: test_grant_consent_does_not_grant_if_cancelled
entries.description: Test grant_consent does nothing if cancelled.

entries.name: test_grant_consent_does_not_grant_if_revoked
entries.description: Test grant_consent does nothing if revoked.

entries.name: test_grant_consent_sets_accepted
entries.description: Test grant_consent sets owner_has_accepted and timestamp.

entries.name: test_profile_has_access_false_for_other
entries.description: Test profile_has_access returns False for unrelated profile.

entries.name: test_profile_has_access_received_by
entries.description: Test profile_has_access returns True for data owner.

entries.name: test_profile_has_access_sent_by
entries.description: Test profile_has_access returns True for requester.

entries.name: test_received_by_false_for_others
entries.description: Test received_by returns False for non-owner.

entries.name: test_received_by_true_for_profile
entries.description: Test received_by returns True for data owner.

entries.name: test_sent_by_false_for_others
entries.description: Test sent_by returns False for non-requester.

entries.name: test_sent_by_true_for_requester
entries.description: Test sent_by returns True for requester.

entries.name: test_approved_by_owner_false_when_revoked
entries.description: Test approved_by_owner returns False when revoked.

entries.name: test_approved_by_owner_true_when_accepted_not_revoked
entries.description: Test approved_by_owner returns True when accepted and not revoked.

entries.name: test_is_active_false_when_cancelled
entries.description: Test is_active returns False when cancelled.

entries.name: test_is_active_false_when_not_accepted
entries.description: Test is_active returns False when not accepted.

entries.name: test_is_active_false_when_revoked
entries.description: Test is_active returns False when revoked.

entries.name: test_is_active_when_accepted_not_cancelled_not_revoked
entries.description: Test is_active returns True when consent is fully active.

entries.name: test_is_cancelled_property
entries.description: Test is_cancelled property.

entries.name: test_is_revoked_property
entries.description: Test is_revoked property.

entries.name: test_revoke_consent_does_not_remove_from_group
entries.description: Test revoke_consent does NOT remove profile from group.

entries.name: test_revoke_consent_does_nothing_if_not_accepted
entries.description: Test revoke_consent does nothing if not yet accepted.

entries.name: test_revoke_consent_sets_revoked
entries.description: Test revoke_consent sets consent_revoked and timestamp.

entries.name: test_sponsor_sets_costs_pro_account_quota
entries.description: Test sponsor sets costs_pro_account_quota to True.

entries.name: test_unsponsor_sets_costs_pro_account_quota
entries.description: Test unsponsor sets costs_pro_account_quota to False.

entries.name: test_agent_responds_after_tool_failure
entries.description: Agent should produce a text response even if a tool returns an error.

entries.name: test_followup_after_error_retains_context
entries.description: After a failed turn, a follow-up should still work correctly.

entries.name: test_modify_references_previous_workout
entries.description: Second message should modify the same workout, not create a new one.

entries.name: test_create_and_schedule_chains_both_tools
entries.description: 'Create a workout for tomorrow morning' should call both workouts AND schedule.

entries.name: test_biodata_query_calls_biodata_tool
entries.description: 'How did I sleep?' should call the biodata tool.

entries.name: test_biometrics_query_calls_biometrics_tool
entries.description: 'What are my HR zones?' should call biometrics tool.

entries.name: test_schedule_query_calls_schedule_get
entries.description: 'What's on my schedule?' should call schedule_get.

entries.name: test_workout_creation_calls_workouts_tool
entries.description: 'Create a workout' should call the workouts tool with action=create.

entries.name: test_does_not_regenerate_existing_title
entries.description: Existing conversation titles should not be overwritten.

entries.name: test_generates_title_after_first_exchange
entries.description: Title generated after first user + assistant exchange.

entries.name: test_title_is_concise_and_descriptive
entries.description: Generated title should be concise (under 100 chars).
